objective: Add one capability-gated responder entry point that joins exactly 239.255.172.215:16571 on one caller-explicit IPv4 loopback interface, serves exactly one existing bounded short-info query/response, and leaves membership and releases the socket under the existing finite deadline and cancellation contracts.
outputs: One exact-group explicit-loopback multicast responder composition using the existing responder parser, envelope, activation, and finite lifecycle.
Focused positive, cancellation/deadline, damaged-configuration, cleanup, fixture/checker, documentation, and policy evidence.
non_scope: Interface enumeration or default selection, non-loopback interfaces, configurable or other groups/ports, IPv6, multiple queries or responses, background workers, requester changes, new activation modules, ambient activation, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied source, commands, stream admission/routing, or Manifold authority.
commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately and normally push only after exact passing current evidence and no-force ancestry/readback.

acceptance.proof: The existing responder capability gates one exact joined-loopback query/response and cleanup.
Exact group/interface/count, damaged configuration, activation, limitations, and nonclaims remain closed.
Owner, Standard, public-boundary, documentation, instruction, and workflow contracts pass.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound exact responder membership runtime and nonclaims.
Separate exact implementation from observation and broader claims.
Existing Rusty LSL compatibility ownership applies.
Existing capability and authority guidance applies.
